To be good or nice. Example: 좋아요 = It is: To be big. Example: 커요 = It is big.
To be small. Example: 작아요 = It is small.
To be many or a lot. Example: 많아요 = There is a lot.
To be pretty. Example: 너무 예뻐요 = So pretty.
To be delicious. Example: 맛있어요 = It is delicious.
To not be tasty. Example: 맛없어요 = It does not taste good.
To be expensive. Example: 비싸요 = It is expensive.
To be cheap. Example: 싸요 = It is cheap.
To be shy or embarrassed. Example: 부끄러워요 = I am shy.
To be curious. Example: 궁금해요 = I am curious.
To be warm. Example: 따뜻한 거 하나 주세요 = One warm drink, please.
To be cold. Example: 차가운 거 주세요 = Cold one, please.
To be not enough. Example: 아직 많이 부족해요 = I still have a lot to learn.
To be okay or fine. Example: 괜찮아요 = It is okay.
